description: Starting point - Philip is one of the seven deacons chosen in Jerusalem
Philip proclaims the Messiah and performs miraculous signs; Simon the Sorcerer believes
Philip is directed by the Spirit to the Gaza road; meets the Ethiopian eunuch on the desert road
Philip is caught away by the Spirit; later appears preaching throughout the region
Final destination - Philip settles here with his four prophesying daughters; continues his evangelistic ministry
